standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للغة الإنجليزية المنطوقة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to spoken English in basic and simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: التفاعل مع اللغة الإنجليزية المنطوقة في عروض قصيرة بسيطة وتعليمات وأسئلة ومحادثات موجهة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Interact with spoken English in short, simple presentations, instructions, questions and guided conversations
indicators: Identify the main ideas and specific details in oral descriptions of people, places and events
Respond to questions before, during and after listening
Respond to oral presentations, instructions or conversations through questions or statements
Extract information from an oral text to do a task
Identify the topic of oral texts
Identify the setting, participants and plot of a short oral story
Begin to compare oral input (story vs. conversation)
Begin to make inferences when listening

learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Understand spoken words, phrases and sentences
indicators: Identify the number of syllables in a spoken word
Use clues to understand new or unfamiliar words when listening (context, illustrations, visual elements)
Ask and answer questions to seek help, get information or clarify something
Show engagement and care when listening to others

standards.nameAr: تطوير استراتيجيات المحادثة للتواصل بدقة وفعالية
standards.nameEn: Develop speaking strategies to communicate accurately and effectively

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: التحدث بنطق واضح وتنغيم ونبر صحيح
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Speak with clear pronunciation, intonation and stress
indicators: Produce two and three syllable words with the correct stress
Accurately pronounce simple vowels and diphthongs
Practice English rhythm

standards.nameEn: Communicate and interact in dialogues and exchanges

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تطوير استراتيجيات المحادثة لصياغة حوارات وتبادلات أطول حول مجموعة أوسع من المواضيع
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Develop speaking strategies to formulate longer dialogues and exchanges on a wider range of topics
indicators: Take longer turns in pair and group work
Maintain the conversation (keep it going)
Speak intelligibly while making statements, asking questions, giving instructions and reporting events
Speak with less preparation and guidance from the teacher and more improvisation

Retell stories and factual events based on visual input using 4-7 connected sentences that use a variety of structures (simple present, simple past, present progressive, simple future, questions, negatives, permission, suggestions, invitations)

standards.nameAr: القراءة لفهم مجموعة متنوعة من السرد الواقعي والنصوص المعلوماتية والأدبية
standards.nameEn: Read to understand a variety of factual recounts and informational and literary texts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تطوير استراتيجيات القراءة لفهم مجموعة متنوعة من النصوص الواقعية والمعلوماتية والأدبية
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Develop reading strategies to understand a variety of factual, informational and literary texts
indicators: Identify and use prefixes and suffixes (un-, dis-, ir-, -ful, -ment, -tion) and visual clues to infer the meaning of new vocabulary items
Identify a range of punctuation marks for expression and meaning
Segment long texts into smaller sections and read one section at a time
Use various text features (captions subheadings) to locate key facts or information in a text

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: إظهار فهم السرد الواقعي البسيط والنصوص المعلوماتية والأدبية
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Demonstrate understanding of simple factual recounts and informational and literary texts
indicators: Skim and scan a text for main ideas and key details
Identify the topic, main ideas(s) and key facts in a reading text
Distinguish facts from opinions
Distinguish the (expository) type of the text (cause/effect, comparison, problem/solution, chronology)
Reinterpret information through creating an illustration (charts, diagrams, timelines) based on the information in the text
Identify the setting, participants and plot of a short story
Summarize fiction and non-fiction texts
Identify themes and moral lessons in Aesop's Fables

standards.nameAr: الاستجابة لمجموعة متنوعة من السرد الواقعي والنصوص المعلوماتية والأدبية
standards.nameEn: Respond to a variety of factual recounts and informational and literary texts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: إجراء روابط بين المعرفة السابقة والتجارب والنصوص
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Make connections between prior knowledge and experiences and simple factual recounts, and informational and literary texts
indicators: Determine key points in a text and whether or not they concur on it
Express opinions on characters and events, justifying them with information in a text
Explain how specific images or illustrations clarify and contribute to a text
Demonstrate understanding of message in stories, fables or lesson

standards.nameAr: التعرف على أن الكتابة يمكن أن تكون منظمة بطرق للتعبير عن أغراض مختلفة
standards.nameEn: Recognize that writing can be structured in ways to express different purposes

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تأليف نصوص من 5-7 جمل باستخدام نصوص القراءة كنماذج
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Compose 5-7-sentence texts using reading texts as models
indicators: Use correct sentence grammar, punctuation and capitalization
Write texts using a range of sentence connectives
Write a short, simple descriptive text of a person or place in Jordan
Use simple and compound sentences to produce a variety of text types (letters, email, memos, reminders)
Correct a written text with mistakes of spelling, punctuation and usage
Revise a composition based on peer feedback

standards.nameAr: عرض لفهم مجموعة متنوعة من النصوص المرئية
standards.nameEn: View to understand a variety of visual texts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: التعرف على أن استخدام موارد النص المرئي يمكن أن يوفر معلومات ويؤثر على الجمهور
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Recognize that the use of visual text resources can provide information and influence the audience
indicators: Start to demonstrate understanding of visual information by asking relevant questions
Listen to other learners' responses, realizing that people react differently
Discuss his/her own feelings in response to visual messages
Reflect on why others may perceive the images differently
Respond to a variety of oral presentations including stories, poems and rhymes with confidence
Interpret visual cues in order to analyze and make inferences about the intention of the message
Identify aspects of body language in a dramatic presentation and explain how they are used to convey the mood and personal traits of characters
Design posters and charts, using shapes, colors, symbols, layout and fonts to achieve particular effects

standards.nameAr: الاستجابة لمجموعة متنوعة من النصوص المرئية
standards.nameEn: Respond to a variety of visual texts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: استخدام الصور المرئية لعرض المعلومات الواقعية أو سرد قصة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Use visual imagery to present factual information or to tell a story
indicators: Demonstrate how the words and pictures work together to convey a particular message
Rehearse and deliver individually or in collaboration a visual presentation on familiar course theme topics
Rehearse and deliver in collaboration a visual presentation on familiar course theme topics
Use body language to add meaning to oral presentation
